raw_columns.Semantics:
An Attestation Result structure produced by Verifiers 
appraising Proof of Process Evidence, conveying verification verdicts, 
confidence scores, and forensic assessments per the IETF RATS architecture.
raw_columns.Reference: [witnessd Proof of Process Evidence Format, Version 1.3.0][David_Lee_Condrey]
